canon.name: C5 CHANGELOG [Unreleased] has Added entry
canon.remediation: Prepend an Unreleased bullet via append_changelog_entry.py

workflow.name: D1 at least one design artifact
workflow.evidence: no design artifacts (no mockups/*.html, no screens.md, no user-flow.md)
workflow.remediation: Produce mockups/*.html OR write .shipwright/agent_docs/screens.md OR .shipwright/agent_docs/user-flow.md before completing the design phase.

workflow.name: D2 screens.md + user-flow.md documented (Tier-2)
workflow.remediation: Document screens in .shipwright/agent_docs/screens.md and flows in .shipwright/agent_docs/user-flow.md (text-only descriptions are OK).
